data.title: Bed Bath & Beyond to acquire The Container Store
data.description: The Container Store, along with Elfa and Closet Works, will join Bed Bath & Beyond as the parent company adds new executives to its team.

data.title: Eddie Bauer adopts Deck Commerce's platform for order orchestration
data.description: The Deck Commerce announcement comes as O5 Group makes an ecommerce push with Eddie Bauer while physical stores close.

data.title: Gopuff to work with NextNRG on delivering groceries alongside gas
data.description: A new EzShop service will give shoppers access to Gopuff options as they order fuel from NextNRG.

data.title: BJ's Wholesale names new chief merchandising officer
data.description: Stephanie Reibling officially stepped into the role on April 1. She reports to the retailer's chief commercial officer.

data.title: Amazon to add fuel and logistics surcharges
data.description: Businesses, including Amazon, have faced increased operating costs tied to fulfillment and supply chains as a result of the U.S. and Israel's war on Iran. The price of a barrel of crude oil has reached $112, as of April 3. On Feb. 3, it was about $60.
